Appearances:
Plaintiff, Real Management Company is represented by JJ Panzer, Agent for Landlord.
Attorney, David Wasserman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sarah Caravan, is present.
Attorney, Laura Carter, representing the defendant.
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
